title: Now
description:
Kill or be quick! In this game, you must either solve problems or run for your life!

About the Game: With its radiation-charged atmosphere and rich mechanics, *Now* invites players to a strategic survival challenge. In the heat of an operation, you must use your surroundings wisely and stay alert against unexpected threats.

Key Features:

• Tactical FPS Experience: Make the right decisions under time and resource constraints.

• Strategy: Solve problems and make critical choices.

• Atmospheric Environments: Detailed maps designed to fully immerse you in the game.
description_short: Now is a challenging action-strategy FPS survival game. Set in a world filled with radiation and mystery, you must complete various missions while trying to stay alive against radioactive threats. Do you have the skills and courage to survive in the middle of operations? Let's see!
